title: [YTP] reggie-iwata.veg (Unfinished | 2012)
description:
A three-year old file I thought was lost forever. Painstakingly reconstructed from a .veg file I found on an external hard drive, and was never rendered out before now. Fortunately I managed to find and re-download almost all of the source files. I'm uploading it here now, for preservation purposes, with all its imperfections.

The big "point" of that video was that it was supposed to be released very soon after the original source. I never finished it and not long after that I lost the files. I was saddened at the news of Satoru Iwata's death in June this year. No disrespect is intended – I didn't want the video to be lost. Reggie is best Reggie
